case_title: HOLLEY, VIVIAN LAW OFFICES VIVIAN VS LEE, BETTY

SC MOTION DISPOSITION NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF MAR-25-2004, GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, BETTY
THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMNT ON THE JUDGMENT.
THE PARTIES AGREE THAT THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR WILL PAY $150.00 FROM EACH PAYCHECK PER MONTH, STARTING 4/1/04, UNTIL THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED.
